prompt: Review the TypeScript code in server.ts and report any security, architecture, or code-quality issues you find. Provide a written report with severity ratings (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW), evidence (file + line), and recommended fixes.
assertions: Detects SQL injection in /users/search (string interpolation) as HIGH
Detects hardcoded Stripe API key as HIGH
Does NOT falsely flag /users/:id parameterized query as SQL-injection vulnerable
